APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT CANO, GABRIEL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANO, GABRIEL PEREZ, ELIAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 TURK STREET #55 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUED FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 2/4/03. PLAINTIFF WAIVES JUDGMENT FOR BACK RENT AND UNALWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES SO LONG AS DEFENDANTS VACATE BY 2/4/03 AT 5:00 P.M. OTHERWISE IF THEY FAIL TO VACATE TIMELY AS INDICATED, PLTF. TO HAVE AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT OF $1,000.00 AND DAILY DAMAGES OF $21.42 PER DAY FROM 11/15/02 TO 2/4/03, TOGETHER WITH COST OF $199.30 AND NO ATTY. FEES. TOTAL AMENDED JUDGMENT IF REQUIRED WILL BE $3,005.75 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
